name: pre.dev
description: The pre.dev MCP Server is an MCP endpoint that plugs into AI coding agents and IDEs (Cursor, Claude Code, VS Code, Windsurf) to replace lightweight planning modes with production-ready specification generation. It outputs enterprise-grade architecture (APIs, DB schemas, component hierarchy) and step-by-step implementation roadmaps via two tools—fast_spec for quick MVPs and deep_spec for comprehensive systems—so agents can reliably plan and build complex, multi-file projects.
